title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.270 - Prisoner to be remanded after testifying
text:
491.270.  Prisoner to be remanded after testifying. — A prisoner who shall be brought before any court, public body or officer, upon a writ of habeas corpus, to testify, shall be remanded, after having testified, to the prison from which he was taken.
(RSMo 1939 § 1913) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1749; 1919 § 5436; 1909 § 6380 
Television, closed circuit coverage of prisoners for court appearance when, requirements, 561.031
